name: Korea Stock Market MCP Server
what_it_does: Community MCP server for Korean financial market data. Enables AI agents to search company disclosures and financial statements from the Korean market via DART (Data Analysis, Retrieval and Transfer System), retrieve stock profiles, query financial filings, and access Korea's public financial disclosure database — essential for Korean market investment research.
use_cases: Accessing Korean public company financial statements from investment research agents
Searching company disclosures from the Korean DART system from compliance agents
Korean stock market profile and fundamentals from financial analysis agents
Due diligence research on Korean listed companies from M&A and investment agents
not_for: Real-time Korean stock price feeds (disclosure/filing focus, not tick data)
Non-Korean markets (Korea-specific DART and KRX data)
best_when: An investment research or compliance agent working with Korean public markets needs access to Korean company financial statements and regulatory disclosures from the DART system.
avoid_when: You need real-time Korean stock prices or non-Korean financial markets. DART provides regulatory filings, not live market data.

auth.notes: DART Open API key required. Register at dart.fss.or.kr for free API access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — DART Open API is free for registered users
pricing.notes: DART (Financial Supervisory Service) API is free for registered users. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: DART API rate limits apply; adequate for research workflows

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Korean financial disclosure data used for investment decisions — verify accuracy before acting
DART API documentation and data are primarily in Korean — reading Korean financial disclosures may require translation
DART API registration requires Korean contact information in some cases — may be challenging for non-Korean entities
Community server (jjlabsio) — verify DART API coverage for your specific disclosure and financial statement needs
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Korean financial data. DART API key auth. HTTPS. Financial research tool — verify data accuracy and consult financial advisors for investment decisions.

security_score_components.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK. DART API key auth. HTTPS. Financial data requires validation before acting.
